HeroItem.Title: Free Friday Consulting
HeroItem.SubTitle:
Who doesn't love Friday's and anything Free! At Code Buoy, we offer small businesses a one hour virtual consulting session on Friday to discuss any aspects of technology.

Just email us a good time slot between 9AM and 4PM Eastern Time on any Friday and we will schedule the call.

Any questions just let us know!

AboutUsItem.Item1Description: We are a team of technology professionals that have developed software solutions and consulted for a wide range of businesses and organizations of all sizes.

HighlightSubTitle: Quality and Affordable Technology Solutions for your Business
